title: Missing Time Bound on Time-Sensitive Choice
source_title: DAML Temporal Pattern - Missing Expiration Verification
description: An offer with an explicit expiration timestamp lacks a `getTime` assertion when it is claimed. Thus, the offer is valid indefinitely.
recommendation: Use `getTime` inside choices that are subject to an explicit time window.

oracle.description: Time-bounded contracts must assert `getTime` against their deadline.
oracle.static_signal: A time field on the contract is never compared to `getTime` in an `assertMsg` or `ensure` clause during a choice.
oracle.symbolic_property: forall t c. executes(ClaimOffer, c) => time(t) <= c.expiresAt
